---
title: "ggscalebars"
output: github_document
---


<!-- badges: start -->
[![Lifecycle: stable](https://img.shields.io/badge//lifecycle-stable-green.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#stable)

<!-- badges: end -->

Scalebars are commonly used as alternatives to classical axes. 
   This package provides scalebars for ggplot.  

```{r setup, message=FALSE, include=FALSE}
lifecycle::badge("stable")
devtools::load_all()

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "man/figures/", 
  fig.width = 9
)


```

### Package Installation

```{r install_tip, eval=FALSE}
remotes::install_github("NMIephys/ggscalebars")
```



```{r readme_plot}
x=seq(-10,10, length.out=100)
testdata <- data.frame(x=x/10, y=dnorm(x))
p<- ggplot(testdata, aes(x,y)) + geom_line()

p
```



```{r drc}
p + scalebars(ylength=.1)
```
